info.title: HRM API
info.description: Human Resource Management System API — Sardar IT

get.summary: List all feedback with filters and pagination

parameters.name: quarter
parameters.description: Filter by quarter — format: Y-Q e.g. 2026-Q1

403.description: Forbidden — GM and Super Admin only

post.summary: Submit anonymous feedback
post.description: Any authenticated employee can submit feedback. No user identity is stored — complete anonymity guaranteed.

message.example: The management team has been very supportive this quarter.

get.summary: Get feedback summary grouped by sentiment for a quarter

403.description: Forbidden — GM and Super Admin only

get.summary: Get feedback summary grouped by category and sentiment

403.description: Forbidden — GM and Super Admin only

get.summary: List all active attendance policies

post.summary: Create a new attendance policy

grace_period_minutes.description: Minutes allowed after shift start before marking late (0-60)

late_count_threshold.description: Number of late marks that trigger a deduction

half_day_threshold_hours.description: Minimum hours to avoid half day mark (1-12)

effective_from.description: Date from which this policy is effective

get.summary: Get attendance policy by ID

post.summary: Assign attendance policy to an employee
post.description: Closes current active policy assignment and creates a new one from the effective date

attendance_policy_id.description: ID of the policy to assign

effective_from.description: Date from which this policy assignment is effective

get.summary: Get current active attendance policy for an employee

404.description: No active policy found for this user

get.summary: Get full policy assignment history for an employee

post.summary: Login with email and password
Logout and invalidate JWT token
Refresh JWT token and get a new one

get.summary: Get currently authenticated user details
List all channels with pagination

post.summary: Create a new channel

403.description: Forbidden — GM and Super Admin only

get.summary: Get channel by ID with all projects

403.description: Forbidden — GM and Super Admin only

delete.description: Cannot delete a channel that has projects assigned to it

403.description: Forbidden — GM and Super Admin only

422.description: Cannot delete channel with existing projects

get.summary: Get all active channels — for dropdowns
List all departments with pagination

post.summary: Create a new department

get.summary: Get department by ID with teams and members

delete.description: Cannot delete a department that has active users or teams

422.description: Cannot delete department with active users or teams

get.summary: Get all active departments
List all holidays for a given year

parameters.name: year
parameters.description: Year to get holidays for — defaults to current year

post.summary: Create a new holiday

is_recurring.description: True if this holiday recurs every year

403.description: Forbidden — GM and Super Admin only

get.summary: Get holiday by ID

403.description: Forbidden — GM and Super Admin only
Forbidden — GM and Super Admin only

get.summary: Get upcoming holidays

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Number of upcoming holidays to return — defaults to 5

get.summary: List all hour logs with filters and pagination

403.description: Forbidden — Team Leader and above only

post.summary: Submit a new hour log entry
post.description: Employee logs hours worked on a project. Only applicable for hourly type projects.

log_date.description: Date of work — cannot be in the future

description.example: Worked on API integration and unit tests

get.summary: Get hour log by ID

put.description: Only pending hour logs can be updated. Approved or rejected logs cannot be modified.

422.description: Only pending hour logs can be updated

delete.description: Only pending hour logs can be deleted. Approved or rejected logs cannot be deleted.

422.description: Only pending hour logs can be deleted

patch.description: PM or Team Leader approves the submitted hour log

403.description: Forbidden — Team Leader and above only

422.description: Only pending hour logs can be approved

patch.description: PM or Team Leader rejects the submitted hour log

403.description: Forbidden — Team Leader and above only

422.description: Only pending hour logs can be rejected

get.summary: Get hour log summary for a project
get.description: Returns total approved hours, pending log count and total pending hours

200.description: Project hour log summary retrieved successfully

message.example: Project hour log summary retrieved successfully

403.description: Forbidden — Team Leader and above only

get.summary: Get authenticated employee own hour logs
List all leave requests with filters and pagination

403.description: Forbidden — GM and Super Admin only

post.summary: Submit a new leave request
post.description: Employee submits a leave request. It automatically goes to the Project Manager for approval.

project_id.description: ID of the project — determines which PM receives the request

from_date.description: Leave start date — must be today or future

to_date.description: Leave end date — must be on or after from_date

422.description: Validation error or insufficient leave balance

get.summary: Get leave request by ID with approval history
Get authenticated employee own leave requests
Get pending leave requests for Project Manager approval

parameters.name: project_id
parameters.description: ID of the project to filter pending requests

get.summary: Get all pending leave requests for General Manager approval

403.description: Forbidden — GM and Super Admin only

post.summary: Project Manager approves or rejects leave request
post.description: If approved, the request moves to General Manager. If rejected, the request is closed.

422.description: Leave request is not pending PM approval

post.summary: General Manager approves or rejects leave request
post.description: Final approval step. If approved, leave is confirmed. If rejected, request is closed.

403.description: Forbidden — GM and Super Admin only

422.description: Leave request is not pending GM approval

get.summary: List all leave types

post.summary: Create a new leave type

is_paid.description: Whether this leave type is paid or unpaid

403.description: Forbidden — Super Admin and GM only

get.summary: Get leave type by ID

403.description: Forbidden — Super Admin and GM only
Forbidden — Super Admin and GM only

get.summary: List all milestones for a project

parameters.name: project_id
parameters.description: ID of the project to get milestones for

post.summary: Create a new milestone for a project
post.description: Only applicable for milestone type projects

get.summary: Get milestone by ID

patch.description: Sets status to completed and records the completion date as today
Sets status to missed — used when a deadline is passed without completion

get.summary: Get all overdue milestones across all projects
get.description: Returns pending milestones whose due_date has passed

get.summary: Get authenticated user notifications with pagination

parameters.name: is_read
parameters.description: Filter by read status — true or false

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Filter by notification type e.g. leave, payroll

get.summary: Get unread notification count for authenticated user

post.summary: Mark specific notifications as read

notification_ids.description: Array of notification IDs to mark as read

marked_count.description: Number of notifications marked as read

post.summary: Mark all notifications as read for authenticated user

delete.description: Deletes read notifications older than the specified number of days

parameters.name: days
parameters.description: Delete read notifications older than this many days — defaults to 30

get.summary: List all payroll records with filters and pagination

parameters.name: payroll_month
parameters.description: Filter by specific month — format: Y-m e.g. 2026-03

parameters.name: quarter
parameters.description: Filter by quarter (1-4) — must be used with year

403.description: Forbidden — GM and Super Admin only

post.summary: Generate payroll for a single employee
post.description: Calculates payroll based on attendance records, policy deductions and carry forward from previous month. Creates a draft record.

payroll_month.description: Month to generate payroll for — format: Y-m

403.description: Forbidden — GM and Super Admin only

422.description: Payroll already exists or missing salary/policy

post.summary: Generate payroll for all active employees
post.description: Generates payroll for all active employees for the specified month. Returns success and failed counts.

payroll_month.description: Month to generate payroll for — format: Y-m

403.description: Forbidden — GM and Super Admin only

get.summary: Get payroll record by ID with itemized deduction logs

403.description: Forbidden — GM and Super Admin only

patch.description: Only draft payrolls can be approved. Records who approved and when.

403.description: Forbidden — GM and Super Admin only

422.description: Only draft payrolls can be approved

patch.description: Only approved payrolls can be marked as paid. Records the paid_at timestamp.

403.description: Forbidden — GM and Super Admin only

422.description: Only approved payrolls can be marked as paid

get.summary: Get payroll record for a specific employee and month

403.description: Forbidden — GM and Super Admin only

404.description: Payroll not found for this user and month

get.summary: Get quarterly payroll summary for an employee
get.description: Returns 3 monthly payroll records with totals for the specified quarter

403.description: Forbidden — GM and Super Admin only

get.summary: Get authenticated employee own payroll records
List all projects with filters and pagination

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by project name or client name

parameters.name: from_date
parameters.description: Filter projects starting from this date

parameters.name: to_date
parameters.description: Filter projects with deadline up to this date

403.description: Forbidden — GM and Super Admin only

post.summary: Create a new project

description.example: Full e-commerce solution with payment integration

type.description: single = fixed price, milestone = paid per milestone, hourly = billed by hours

total_budget.description: Total project budget in foreign currency

currency.description: Currency code e.g. USD, GBP, EUR

exchange_rate_snapshot.description: Exchange rate at time of project creation

403.description: Forbidden — GM and Super Admin only

get.summary: Get project by ID with teams and milestones

403.description: Forbidden — GM and Super Admin only

patch.description: When status is set to delivered, delivered_date is automatically set to today

get.summary: Get all ongoing projects ordered by deadline
Get all overdue projects — ongoing projects past their deadline

403.description: Forbidden — GM and Super Admin only

get.summary: Get projects for the authenticated user
get.description: PM sees projects they manage. Other roles see projects they are assigned to.

get.summary: List all roles with their permissions
Get role by ID with all permissions
List all permissions grouped by module

post.summary: Sync all permissions for a role
post.description: Replaces all existing permissions with the provided list

post.summary: Give a single permission to a role

delete.summary: Revoke a single permission from a role

post.summary: Assign a role to a user
post.description: Replaces the user existing role with the new one

get.summary: Get all permissions for a specific user
List all roster assignments with pagination

post.summary: Assign roster to an employee
post.description: Assigns a shift and weekend days to an employee. Automatically closes the previous active roster.

shift_id.description: ID of the shift to assign

effective_from.description: Date from which this roster is effective

get.summary: Get roster assignment by ID
Get current active roster for a specific employee

404.description: No active roster found for this user

get.summary: Get full roster history for a specific employee
get.description: Returns all past and current roster assignments for an employee in descending order

get.summary: Get all employees currently assigned to a specific shift
List all shifts

post.summary: Create a new shift

cross_midnight.description: True if shift spans two calendar days

is_fixed.description: True if this is a fixed permanent shift

get.summary: Get shift by ID
Get all fixed shifts
Get all rotating shifts
List all teams with pagination and filters

parameters.name: has_leader
parameters.description: Filter teams with or without a leader

403.description: Forbidden — GM and Super Admin only

post.summary: Create a new team

leader_id.description: ID of the team leader — optional

403.description: Forbidden — GM and Super Admin only

get.summary: Get team by ID with members and projects

leader_id.description: Set to null to remove leader

403.description: Forbidden — GM and Super Admin only
Forbidden — GM and Super Admin only

post.summary: Add a member to a team
post.description: Project Manager adds an employee to a team. Employee must not already be an active member.

user_id.description: ID of the employee to add

joined_at.description: Date the employee joined the team

422.description: User is already an active member of this team

delete.summary: Remove a member from a team
delete.description: Sets the left_at date to today. Member history is preserved.

parameters.name: user
parameters.description: ID of the employee to remove

422.description: User is not an active member of this team

post.summary: Assign a team to a project
post.description: Project Manager assigns an existing team to a project. A team cannot be assigned twice to the same project.

422.description: Team is already assigned to this project

get.summary: Get all active members assigned to a project

403.description: Forbidden — Team Leader and above only

post.summary: Assign a team member to a specific project
post.description: Team Leader assigns a member from the team to work on a specific project.

user_id.description: ID of the team member to assign

403.description: Forbidden — Team Leader and above only

delete.summary: Release a member from a project
delete.description: Sets the released_at date to today. Assignment history is preserved.

parameters.name: userId
parameters.description: ID of the employee to release

403.description: Forbidden — Team Leader and above only

get.summary: Get teams led by the authenticated Team Leader

403.description: Forbidden — Team Leader and above only

get.summary: List all users with filters and pagination

parameters.name: search
parameters.description: Search by name, email or employee code

post.summary: Create a new user

get.summary: Get user by ID with salary, roster and policy
Get all project managers
Get all team leaders
Get all employees

post.summary: Receive punch data pushed from ZKTeco local agent
post.description: This endpoint is called by the local agent running on the machine where ZKTeco device is connected. Requires X-Sync-Key header for authentication. Creates new punch records or updates existing ones.

parameters.name: X-Sync-Key
parameters.description: Secret API key for local agent authentication

device_id.description: Unique identifier of the ZKTeco device

synced_at.description: Timestamp of when the sync was initiated

punches.description: Array of punch records from the device

uid.description: Device internal UID — auto-incremented by device

id.description: Employee code enrolled on the device

state.description: Device state code — raw value from device

tags.name: Roster
tags.description: Roster assignments — weekends and shift history
